# Pendo Engage API — Endpoint Reference

> Root: `https://engageapi.pendo.io` — Swagger UI with interactive docs.
> OpenAPI spec unavailable — using known resource summary. Fetch `https://engageapi.pendo.io/swagger.json` for full endpoint details.

## Authentication

All requests require an `x-pendo-integration-key` header containing a Pendo integration key.
Base URL varies by region:

| Region | Base URL |
|---|---|
| US (default) | `https://app.pendo.io` |
| EU | `https://app.eu.pendo.io` |
| US1 | `https://us1.app.pendo.io` |
| Japan | `https://app.jpn.pendo.io` |

## Resource Groups

- **Aggregation** — POST /api/v1/aggregation — analytics query pipeline
- **Features** — CRUD for feature tag definitions
- **Pages** — CRUD for page tag definitions
- **Guides** — CRUD for in-app guides
- **Track Events** — Custom track event ingestion and retrieval
- **Visitor Metadata** — Read/write visitor metadata fields
- **Account Metadata** — Read/write account metadata fields
- **NPS / Polls** — NPS poll responses and metadata
- **Reports** — Saved report definitions
- **Subscription** — Subscription-level settings

## Key endpoints (always available)

| Purpose | Method + Path |
|---|---|
| Analytics query | `POST /api/v1/aggregation` |
| Set visitor DNP | `PUT /api/v1/metadata/visitor/pendo/value/{id}/donotprocess` |
| Set account DNP | `PUT /api/v1/metadata/account/pendo/value/{id}/donotprocess` |
| Get visitor metadata schema | `GET /api/v1/metadata/schema/visitor` |
| Get account metadata schema | `GET /api/v1/metadata/schema/account` |
| Bulk delete visitors/accounts | `DELETE /api/v1/entities/{kind}` |
| List guides | `GET /api/v1/guide` |
| Get guide by ID | `GET /api/v1/guide/{id}` |
